items.title: [正面] mmmm me love card game
[正面] I really love this game. Arts are beautiful and wh...
items.summary: I really love this game. Arts are beautiful and what I like the most is the gameplay. Lots of people compare it with Reverse 1999 probably because of artstyle and kind similar UI but gameplay is pretty different. I love Reverse 1999 but for gameplay in my opnion I enjoyed morimens more. Also have to mention it's very f2p friendly. They gave out alooooot of gacha currency by just doing in game stuffs and bunch of codes. I also liked love craftian stories. Some people complained about translation being not great since at first it was only gpt translation and I get that but now translation team is working very hard and I love that. (tbh gpt translation didn't bother me much since my eng isnt that good either lmao) Anyways I recommend playing this game.
